title: coelogyne zollingeri
intro: Coelogyne zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's Coelogyne, is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coelogyne zollingeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use by making a decoction or infusion, often in the form of a tea, which is then consumed to reap its therapeutic benefits.
